name: python3-standard-imghdr
title: python3-standard-imghdr
description:
imghdr Standard Python Lib (Python 3)
imghdr was part of the Standard Python Lib. Now it was removed from
Python. See PEP-594.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-standard-imghdr because imghdr Standard Python Lib (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-standard-imghdr as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-standard-imghdr with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-standard-imghdr --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
